heading: Prohibition on certain disclosures
label: 30183 Prohibition on certain disclosures
text: Any report of the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration, or of any officer, employee, or contractor of the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration, relating to any highway traffic accident or the investigation of such accident conducted pursuant to this chapter or , may be made available to the public only in a manner that does not identify individuals.section 403 of title 23
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective and Termination Dates of 2012 Amendment note under , Highways.Oct. 1, 2012section 3(a) of Pub. L. 112–141section 101 of Title 23
